label: About
title: About Feather Inbox Rupture
short_blurb: A daily generated front page where the image is the interface.
body: Daily Frontpage is a daily generated interactive front page. Each edition starts from recent saved signals and source research, becomes a new image-led scene, and stays explorable in the archive. The image is the interface: visible marks, objects, and surfaces in the scene open the real sources that shaped the day.

This iteration began with 81 recent saved-signal files and 70 captured links, then narrowed the page to 9 source windows around order-a20 and @songyou: Emi Takahashi is currently my favorite designer. she does incredible experiments..., plus 7 more. A source image from feather.computer helped set the palette, contrast, edge behavior, and gesture. The scene became Feather Inbox Rupture: Feather inbox rupture system, product-photo rupture on an oblique product table: a cream field with diagonal cut corners, one large broken ordering slab across center, sparse dot-and-stroke gestures enlarged into physical marks. Frosted alert apertures and document slips offset the slab; a circular coupon node orbit... After the image was made, a plate-reading pass mapped 9 visible regions and the mask audit tightened them against central jagged acrylic fracture, left slab coral pull strip, and right slab teal photo aperture.

typography.rationale: Bricolage Grotesque and Space Grotesk fit record, arcade, and listening-room editions while Fraunces keeps source captions tactile.
